characters.description: A newly graduated immaterial guide who reaches Bandfast with her keystone intact but her supporting inscriptions lost. Her precise gravity workings are expressed through her hands, and heavy academy and family debts leave her urgently seeking paid work.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: A material creator at Bandfast's teleportation tower. Phoen helps confirm that Tala's keystone still functions, then explains how its survival complicates her choice between accepting mageling pay and seeking employment at a mage's rate.
characters.name: Phoen

characters.description: An unidentified humanoid arcane that holds Tala's attention through an apparent conceptual allure and then causes her to doubt the encounter. Tala's keystone confirms that the manipulation occurred, but the figure's identity and purpose remain unknown.
characters.name: Humanoid arcane

characters.description: A senior former checker who recruits for the Caravaner's Guild. Lyn detects Tala's intact keystone, negotiates her long-term caravan contract, and begins arranging the practical support needed for her first assignment.
characters.name: Lyn

characters.description: A master inscriber who finds that Tala's sophisticated existing design is poorly matched to her body and needs. Holly proposes an expensive, staged replacement intended to make Tala's passive inscriptions more durable and effective.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: A Bandfast-raised caravan guard assigned to Tala's coming journey. Though initially cautious around her because she is a mage, Ashin serves as her local guide and helps her obtain the basic equipment needed for the trip.
characters.name: Ashin

characters.description: A Wainwright arbiter, Archon, and expert in dimensional cargo workings. Himmal tests Tala's capacity, teaches her to empower spell forms through a clear mental model, and offers to sponsor her for Archon status when she is ready.
characters.name: Himmal

characters.description: A material creator specializing in kinetic energy who meets Tala in the Guild mage lounge. Her strange appearance under Mage Sight unsettles him, but his curiosity leads him to share a meal and introduce her to other caravan mages.
characters.name: Cran

characters.description: A material guide specializing in ice and lightning who will help defend the Alefast caravan. Trent is Renix's master, and his first examination of Tala under Mage Sight leaves him alarmed by her unusual magical defenses.
characters.name: Trent

characters.description: Trent's mageling, a material creator who works with ice and lightning. Renix is traveling as one of the Alefast caravan's defensive mages and reacts with fascination when allowed to examine Tala through Mage Sight.
characters.name: Renix

characters.description: An earthworking material guide assigned to defend the Alefast caravan. Atrexia can manipulate rock, soil, and related substances, and she immediately investigates Tala's unusual presence under Mage Sight.
characters.name: Atrexia

characters.description: The driver of the lead dimensional cargo wagon. Den is uneasy about Tala choosing to walk beside the caravan, but he accommodates her by storing her pack, explaining her options, and allowing her to use the wagon's roof seat.
characters.name: Den

characters.description: The guard commander responsible for the Alefast caravan. Divner oversees the armed force protecting the wagons, confirms that Tala's dimensional cargo slots are ready, and gives the order to depart Bandfast.
characters.name: Divner

characters.description: A caravan guard who takes part in protecting the convoy in the wilds. After an Arcanous bird is killed, Adam gives Tala permission to claim the unassigned remains for her experiments and possible future use.
characters.name: Adam

characters.description: The caravan's head chef and a keeper of its hidden Arcanous-meat practice. Brand attacks Tala when she discovers the secret, then explains that selected workers have eaten such meat for decades in hopes of gaining strength and improved healing.
characters.name: Brand

characters.description: An intelligent magical predator capable of precise teleportation. It ambushes Tala beside the caravan, breaks both bones in her left forearm, and escapes both her continuing gravity restraint and Renix's attempted lightning strike.
characters.name: Dimensional terror bird

characters.description: A caravan passenger who commissions Tala to obtain one thunderbolt horn for a spouse's treatment and promises five gold ounces in payment.
characters.name: Thunderbolt-horn passenger

characters.description: A massive creature hunted for a commissioned horn. Tala finds one alone and attacks it with a partly exposed ending-tree stick, damaging its skull. The wounded creature answers with an immense lightning strike.
characters.name: Thunderbolt

characters.description: A powerful regional creature whose horns provide protection and whose antlers produce lightning. It confronts the caravan before the mountain pass, joining battle with the defensive mages and seriously injuring Renix.
characters.name: Midnight Fox

characters.description: An Alefast merchant connected to the Order of the Harvest through Brand. Artia deals in magical objects and offers Tala equipment and dimensional storage in exchange for useful harvests from Arcanous Beasts.
characters.name: Artia

characters.description: The head of Alefast's local Archon Council. Grediv examines Tala's blood-made drops, confirms that they are weak Archon Stars, and recognizes both her unusual magical defenses and her ability to perceive within her own body.
characters.name: Grediv
